text.title: Freelance Tax Cashflow Basics Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure for Freelance Tax Cashflow Basics.

step.name: compute-checklist
step.input: trailing-12m revenue + expense + bank balances + invoice list

step.name: verify-quarterly-tax
step.action: If paid=false and current quarter deadline passed, flag for accountant.

step.name: verify-vat-on-eu-b2b
step.action: Confirm every EU B2B invoice carries reverse-charge notation. Flag mismatches.

step.name: entity-decision
step.action: If >$50k and entity=sole_trader, schedule accountant consult.

step.name: runway-and-block
step.action: Compute runway_months. If <6 and any strategic move pending, block until runway rebuilt.
